title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Myntra Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Myntra Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Myntra Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Myntra Logistics:
Myntra Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra Logistics!
